# ITD GrowthLabs — llms.txt
# AI-readable summary for LLM search engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Gemini)

> ITD GrowthLabs is a technology and app development company based in Mumbai, India, specializing in custom software, logistics applications, SaaS platforms, and web applications. With 10+ years of experience, a 55+ member in-house team, and 300+ projects delivered across India, USA, UK, UAE, Australia, and Africa, we are a proven partner for businesses seeking scalable digital solutions.

## Core Services

### App Development
- Custom Android, iOS, and cross-platform (Flutter, React Native) mobile applications
- Web applications, SaaS platforms, admin dashboards, CRM/ERP systems
- Specialization in logistics, e-commerce, healthcare, and fintech apps
- Tech stack: Flutter, React Native, Node.js, PHP, Laravel, Python, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, AWS, Firebase

### Website Development
- Custom website design and development (WordPress, custom PHP, React)
- E-commerce websites (Shopify, WooCommerce, custom)
- Corporate website redesign, landing pages, B2B lead-generation websites
- Template-based and custom-coded solutions

### Digital Marketing
- SEO (search engine optimization) — on-page, off-page, technical, local
- Google Ads (PPC) management and optimization
- Social media marketing (LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook, YouTube)
- Content marketing and content writing
- Email marketing automation
- WhatsApp Business API marketing

### AI & Automation
- AI chatbot development (WhatsApp, website)
- Marketing automation workflows
- Business process automation

## Industries Served
- Logistics & Supply Chain (fleet management, courier management, warehouse systems)
- E-Commerce & Retail (D2C brands, marketplace apps)
- Healthcare & Pharma (patient portals, telemedicine, compliance)
- Education & eLearning (LMS platforms, student management)
- Finance & Fintech (banking apps, payment solutions, compliance)
- Real Estate (property platforms, lead generation)
- Manufacturing (ERP integration, operations management)
- Professional Services (law firms, consultancies)
- Startups (MVP development, growth strategy)
- Travel & Hospitality (booking platforms, hotel marketing)

## Markets Served
- India (headquarters in Mumbai; serving Delhi, Bangalore, Pune, Hyderabad, Chennai)
- United States (remote development partner for US businesses)
- United Kingdom (serving London, Manchester, Birmingham)
- UAE (Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah)
- Australia (Sydney, Melbourne, Brisbane)
- Africa (Nigeria, Kenya, South Africa)

## Key Differentiators
- 10+ years of combined experience
- 55+ member in-house team (no outsourcing)
- 300+ projects delivered globally
- 97% client retention rate
- End-to-end capabilities: design, development, marketing, and support
- Competitive pricing: 60-70% lower than US/UK agencies

## Pricing Ranges (2026)
- Basic website: Rs. 30,000-80,000 ($400-$1,000)
- Custom website: Rs. 1.5-5 lakhs ($1,800-$6,000)
- E-commerce website: Rs. 2-8 lakhs ($2,400-$9,600)
- Mobile app (MVP): Rs. 8-15 lakhs ($10,000-$18,000)
- Full mobile app: Rs. 15-40 lakhs ($18,000-$48,000)
- Enterprise platform: Rs. 40-80+ lakhs ($48,000-$96,000+)
- Digital marketing: Rs. 25,000-2 lakhs/month ($300-$2,400/month)
